description: Style Note Light weight and stylish, this T-shirt from adidas is comfortable and looks great. Engineered with Climalite technology this tee will ensure that you are dry and comfortable all day long. Pair it with your workout shorts and sport shoes for a more comfortable workout session or denims for a casual day out in the sun. Product Details Purple T-shirt, has a round neckline, print on the shoulders and back, cropped inner with shoulder straps and elasticated band below bust which is attached at side seams, branding on the left in front and a drawstring tie Material and Care 100% Cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach, iron or dry clean Dry in shade Cold iron do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33") is wearing a size M
